_comment: Golden-master for the Block 7 agent-eval `dbmd search` eval over corpus-a-canonical: 20 representative queries spanning --type, --in, --where, and --updated-after (the plan's Block 7 search-eval requirement). Queries 1-10 mirror this corpus's own EXPECTED/search.json (already-audited goldens); queries 11-20 are additional intent-derived cases. `matches` is the complete set, sorted by store-relative path ascending, derived from corpus content + the SPEC search contract (embedded ripgrep over the frontmatter+body of every CONTENT file; meta files DB.md/index.md/index.jsonl/log.md never match; --type narrows by frontmatter type, --in by layer (sources/records — the wiki layer is gone, synthesis pages are now `meta-type: conclusion` records), --where by frontmatter key=value, --updated-after compares the frontmatter `updated` strictly-after). Query strings are ripgrep regexes, case-sensitive by default. Consumed by crates/dbmd-cli/tests/agent_eval.rs.

queries.intent: Plain phrase, no filter; appears in the renewal call record and the project conclusion record.
Distinctive body phrase in exactly one source doc (the MSA extraction).
Case-sensitive default term in Elena's contact record and her profile conclusion.
Meta-type-scoped: only `meta-type: conclusion` records (former wiki synthesis pages) containing `renewal`.
Type-scoped: only the renewal call mentions the 175-seat number.
Type-scoped to contacts; all four reference Northstar.
Regex alternation, type-scoped; only the May AWS invoice is unpaid.
Type-scoped to companies; only the Figma company record.
Type-scoped to expenses, narrowed by one shard date.
Type + recency: contacts mentioning renewal, updated after 2026-05-15.
Type-scoped to companies; the three vendors (aws, figma, github). acme=partner, northstar=customer excluded.
Type-scoped to meetings; the three renewal-themed meetings.

Layer-scoped to records; the Acme company, the Northstar account it owns, the two contacts that name Acme, and the four conclusion records (the former wiki bios/project/plan) that all cite the Acme account.
Meta-type-scoped to conclusion records; the three synthesis pages that cite the 175-seat figure.
Type-scoped to contacts; the two Directors (Elena, Sarah).
Layer-scoped to sources; the one MSA source doc.
Type-scoped to companies; only the GitHub record carries that domain.
Layer-scoped to records; only the Northstar company is in logistics.
Type-scoped to contacts; only Elena's record.
Type + recency cutoff: the lone `synthesis`-type conclusion record (2026-05-23), excluding the 2026-05-22 profiles/project.
